calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian. Alan Horwitz, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Union Street Investors and Defendant, Dorcas Kinyany appeared in pro per. Also present, William Harrism representative of the plaintiff. The case settled per oral stipulation of the parties, read into the record.
